title: Skill Demand and Supply in Poland 2025. Insights from Online Job Postings and Trainings
population_source: Statistics Poland (GUS), Population. Size and structure and vital statistics in Poland by territorial division in 2024. As of 31 December.
labour_force_source: BDL API / subject P3980: Aktywni zawodowo wg płci i wieku (kwartalne BAEL). Denominator = average of Q1-Q4 2025, unit-level=2 (voivodeships).
